comments.comment: SWIM requires a detail code for the *SUM* of the individual congeners - this is not a valid request because it is the individual congeners which are either detected or not. I entered BQ because *most* of the congeners were non-detected, and the sum is made up *mostly* of values which were set to half the DL.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
a d/f source test is performed every four year. these results use the most current source test.

SWIM requires a detail code for the *SUM* of the individual congeners - this is not a valid request because it is the individual congeners which are either detected or not. I entered BQ because *most* of the congeners were non-detected, and the sum is made up *mostly* of values which were set to half the DL.
